name: codex-history-suite
description: Build, maintain, move, search, trace, and export portable evidence-first knowledge bases from local Codex transcripts.

interface.shortDescription: Portable, evidence-first memory for Codex history.
interface.longDescription: Codex History Suite provides a checkpointed cross-platform builder, verified multi-device bundles, non-destructive synchronization, progressive retrieval, and a portable offline conversation evidence viewer over local Codex transcripts, claims, tool traces, and artifact CAS.
interface.defaultPrompt: Build or query my local Codex history knowledge base, trace its evidence, or export original conversation ranges for review.
